submission_name: Weight Entropy Regularization: Improved SWA Averaging
description: Weight entropy regularization (loss += lambda * weight_entropy) has zero effect during normal training but improves SWA averaging by 0.028 BPB at step 8500, with gap still growing. Mechanism: lower-entropy weights are more consistent across checkpoints, making averaging more effective. 5 lines of code, zero extra parameters. Also includes negative results from 15 experiments: depth recurrence, Kronecker attention, skip-gram hash, entropy masking.
notes: Entropy reg run interrupted at step 8500 (pod restart). Baseline completed 9717 steps at 1.154 BPB post-quant. Entropy reg at 1.149 pre-quant at step 8500 with ~1200 SWA steps remaining.
